companyNameJapanese: 株式会社アドバンテスト
description: Leading manufacturer of semiconductor test equipment including automatic test equipment (ATE) for logic, memory, and mixed-signal devices. Strong growth in AI-related tester demand.

_externalRelationships.notes: 60-70% share in memory test, 35-45% in SoC test. Deep relationships with Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron, and TSMC ecosystem.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, CNBC, TradingView, TSPA Semiconductor
_metadata.notes: Record 9-month results. FY March 2026 guidance: Net sales 1.07T JPY, Operating income 454B JPY. All-time high: 29,250 JPY (Jan 29, 2026). Called 'ASML of test industry'.
